---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for the metadata tool
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Business Process Impact

- Which metadata domains are affected? (e.g. data elements, business processes, workflows, lineage)
- Does this introduce a new business process or modify an existing one?
- Which stakeholders or roles are impacted?

## Data Architecture Impact

- Are new data elements or entities required?
- Are schema changes needed (new tables, columns, relationships)?
- Does this affect any Critical Data Elements (CDEs)?
- Are there naming standard implications?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Design Considerations

- **API design**: Any thoughts on endpoint structure, request/response shape, or versioning?
- **Security**: Authentication, authorisation, or data sensitivity considerations?
- **Performance**: Expected data volumes, latency requirements, or scalability concerns?
- **Compatibility**: Impact on existing APIs, data formats, or integrations?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
